# About
Building on a legacy of quantum   
breakthroughs in Copenhagen
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/67220ffe36d9614e9fc0dc64_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
![Blue sparrow quantum feathers, birds of all feathers welcome.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/67335cfda6505b1c137c0413_sparrow-bird.avif)
##  Sparrow Quantum: Deeply Rooted in Decades of Groundbreaking Research
Sparrow Quantum is a spin-out from a powerhouse of innovation: Professor Peter Lodahl's research group at the Niels Bohr Institute. We are building on over 25 years of groundbreaking research, further enhanced by nearly a decade of engineering efforts.   
  
We specialise in advancing light-matter interfaces—the critical component required to scale optical quantum technologies. At the heart of our innovation is our on-chip deterministic single-photon source, a technology that sets industry benchmarks and is trusted by quantum technology leaders worldwide. Empowering our partners and customers with cutting-edge solutions, Sparrow Quantum is turning the immense potential of quantum technology into real-world innovation and impact.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/67220ffe36d9614e9fc0dc64_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
### Global Leadership with Danish Roots
Legacy
#### Building on the Niels Bohr Legacy in Copenhagen  

Sparrow Quantum carries forward the pioneering spirit of the Niels Bohr Institute in Copenhagen. With its primary lab space located in the institute's basement, Sparrow remains deeply connected to its roots while advancing cutting-edge quantum photonic technologies.‍
[Explore](https://sparrowquantum.com/contact#our-locations)
1930
![Niels Bohr Institute](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/67989e539c5beb5a2cf05ca4_Aud%20A%20colorized.png)

#### The Sparrow Flock
Our collective expertise and passion for innovation drive our mission to unlock quantum breakthroughs, one photon at a time. Our flock is constantly expanding, but currently we number:

Sparrows
[Meet the Sparrows](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
Mission
#### Lighting the Way for Quantum Breakthroughs  

Our mission is to harness the power of light to unlock scalable, practical quantum solutions that address real-world challenges and create transformative opportunities across industries. We achieve this by pioneering the development and commercialisation of key quantum photonic building blocks, laying the groundwork for the next generation of quantum computing, secure communication, and the quantum internet.
[Explore](https://sparrowquantum.com/technology)
![quantum dots with gradient by studio september](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/67221f463786ce8d612ecaa8_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
We collaborate with fellow visionaries, pushing quantum technology's boundaries together.
